arts.ttl: 'Dream start!'- Bromley score after eight minutes against Newcastle
arts.sum: Watch League Two Bromley take a shock lead as Cameron Congreve scores within eight minutes against Newcastle United in the FA Cup at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: Monchi negotiating Aston Villa arrival – Working to beat Liverpool and Newcastle, keen to sell Diego Carlos first
arts.sum: Aston Villa, Liverpool and Newcastle United are all reportedly keen on Sevilla’s Loïc Badé in the winter market. Last weekend, AS reported Liverpool and Newcastle are ‘betting heavily’ on the defender. The Villans have started discussions with the La Liga side over a deal for him this month. arts.ttl: Alexander Isak injury: Eddie Howe confirms Newcastle latest ahead of Wolves game
arts.sum: Striker withdrawn at Arsenal before missing Bromley win

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta reveals Arsenal transfers stance after Gabriel Jesus blow and Alexander Isak links
arts.sum: Arsenal are in the market for a striker in the January transfer window after it was confirmed frontman Gabriel Jesus is likely to miss the rest of the season with a knee injury. Speaking on Gabriel Jesus' injury, Arteta said today: "We know more now and it's not looking good at all.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United learn PSR fate as Premier League announces financial penalties
arts.sum: When asked if the club were learning all the time about the PSR rules, Howe told Chronicle Live: "I think the club were educated last year. Clubs learn today whether they are facing punishments for breaching profitability and sustainability rules [PSR] across the three-year accounting period of 2021-24.

Newcastle made it eight wins on the spin as they booked their spot in the next round of the FA Cup with a 3-1 win over Bromley on Sunday. The Magpies are unbeaten in five at St. James' Park, and have ...

arts.ttl: BREAKING: First Premier League club at risk of PSR points deduction discover fate as results confirmed
arts.sum: Premier League strugglers Leicester City are among the clubs who have been waiting to hear whether or not they would face a potential points deduction over PSR issues

arts.ttl: Newcastle United hit by major injury blow as star ruled out for month amid Alexander Isak update
arts.sum: On those absentees, Howe added: "We'll have a look at them again today. But Howe is hopeful that he will not have any further injury issues for his stars despite a long list of absentees against the League Two side.

arts.ttl: 10 VAR errors this season revealed including Bruno Fernandes and Liverpool controversies
arts.sum: VAR has made a total of 10 errors so far this season, according to the Premier League's Key Match Incidents panel - and Mirror Football has taken a look at all the incidents
